db.title: Database Management
db.description: Create snapshot points, download full backup, apply SQL import or export/import by module.

help.snapshotDesc: take a restore point before risky operations, restore it.
help.moduleDesc: transfer only selected module tables (e.g. products).
help.uiDesc: export/bootstrap UI texts in bulk by locale.
help.closeHint: Tip: Click outside or press ESC to close.

fullDb.title: Database Backup & Snapshot Management
fullDb.description: You can create snapshots and download full database backups.
fullDb.downloadDesc: Download the current DB state as a full dump.
fullDb.jsonNotImplemented: JSON export feature not implemented yet. You can use SQL export.

import.title: SQL Import (IMPORT)
import.warning: These operations can permanently change database contents. Especially when truncate is checked, be sure to take a snapshot before proceeding.
import.helpDesc1: This panel applies SQL dump to the entire database (text / URL / file).
import.helpDesc2: empties tables before import. Very risky in production environment.
import.helpDesc3: is a dry run in supported flows (rollback).

text.label: SQL Script (utf8)
text.placeholder: Paste the full SQL script here.
text.helpDesc1: Paste the full SQL script here.
text.helpDesc2: Browser may slow down with very large dumps; file import is more suitable.

url.label: SQL Dump URL (.sql or .sql.gz)
url.required: First enter a valid .sql or .sql.gz URL.
url.helpDesc2: .sql.gz dumps transfer faster with large data.
url.helpDesc3: URLs requiring authentication/protection may not be downloadable by backend.

file.label: SQL Dump File (.sql or .gz)
file.note: There is no dry run in file import flow (only truncate is applied).
file.helpDesc1: Most stable method (recommended for large dumps).
file.helpDesc2: There is no dry run in file import flow.
file.helpDesc3: Nginx/Fastify body limit settings can affect file size.

truncate.label: TRUNCATE ALL tables before operation
truncate.helpDesc: Tables are emptied before import. Incorrect use leads to data loss. Taking a snapshot before the operation in production should be considered mandatory.
truncate.helpDescFile: This is the most critical option in file import. When enabled, tables are completely emptied before import. Consider taking a snapshot mandatory.

dryRun.label: Dry run (rehearsal, roll back changes)
dryRun.helpDesc: If backend supports, runs inside SQL transaction and rolls back. Some DDL operations can do implicit commit in MySQL; not 100% guaranteed.
dryRun.helpDescUrl: If backend supports, does transaction + rollback. Time and resource consumption increases with large dumps.

success.url: SQL dump from URL successfully imported.
success.file: SQL dump from file successfully imported.
success.dryRun: Dry run successful. Changes rolled back.

snapshots.title: Snapshot Points
snapshots.scrollNote: Note: If the screen is narrow, the table can be scrolled horizontally.
snapshots.restoreConfirm:
You are about to restore from this snapshot.

Snapshot: {label}

This operation will OVERWRITE current database content (truncate).
Do you want to continue?
snapshots.restoreError: An error occurred during snapshot restoration.

export.description: Tables of module {module} are exported in manifest order.
export.notImplemented: Module export feature not implemented yet.

import.title: Module Import
import.notImplemented: Module import feature not implemented yet.

validate.title: Manifest Validation
validate.description: Is the table manifest for module {module} compatible with DB?

recurring.description: Define a weekly override pattern such as closing every Friday or forcing a day open.

modes.openDesc: This day stays open every week if working hours exist.
modes.closedDesc: This day is treated as closed every week.

preview.closedByRecurring: This day is closed by a recurring weekly override. Remove the override or switch it to open to preview working ranges again.

daily.title: Daily Plan

notes.capacityCheck: Capacity is checked again at confirmation time by backend rules.

general.title: General Settings

keyDescriptions.contact_info: Phone, email, WhatsApp, and address info.
keyDescriptions.socials: Instagram, Facebook, X, and other social networks.
keyDescriptions.company_profile: Company name, slogan, and about summary.
keyDescriptions.ui_header: Menu labels and CTA button in the header.

payment.title: Payment Settings
payment.description: Configure PayPal and bank transfer options.

bookingPayment.title: Booking Online Payment
bookingPayment.description: When enabled, customers receive a payment link in their booking confirmation email.
bookingPayment.activeNote: Active: Booking confirmation emails will include a payment link. The appointment page will show a "Pay" button after booking.
bookingPayment.inactiveNote: Inactive: Booking confirmation emails will only confirm the appointment without a payment link.

filters.title: Filters
filters.languageDisabledNote: Language selection is not used in this tab.

locales.title: Locales
locales.description: Manage active locales (app_locales) and the default locale (default_locale).

list.title: Settings List
list.hideSeoNote: SEO keys are hidden here; manage them in the SEO tab.
list.mobileNote: On mobile, records are shown as cards.
list.mobileHideSeoSuffix: SEO keys are also hidden here.

form.title: Setting
form.description: Structured mode: form editor. Raw mode: JSON or plain string.
form.structuredMissingDesc: No structured renderer is defined for this key. Use Raw mode.
form.rawHelp: Raw: If you enter valid JSON it will be parsed and saved; otherwise it will be saved as plain text.
form.rawTip: Tip: To save as JSON, start the text with “{” or “[”.

detail.localesMissingDesc: site_settings.app_locales is empty or invalid. Configure languages first.
detail.fallbackNotice: No exact record for {selectedLocale}. Showing fallback from {effectiveLocale}. Saving will create/update {selectedLocale}.
detail.noRecordNotice: No record found for {key} ({locale}). You can create it by saving.
detail.note: Note: General/UI keys open a structured form. Other keys fall back to JSON editor in structured mode.
detail.siteMetaDefaultGlobalGuard: site_meta_default cannot be locale="*". Select a locale and save.

structuredJson.noRenderer: No structured form is defined for this key. Structured mode works as a JSON editor.
structuredJson.label: Structured JSON
structuredJson.helperText: Parsed on blur. Invalid JSON will not be saved.

general.title: General / UI
general.description: GLOBAL (*) default + selected language ({locale}) override are managed together.
general.globalBootstrapTooltip: Creates missing GLOBAL (*) records with default seed
general.noOverrideNote: No {locale} override for this key; GLOBAL (*) is applied.
general.restoreTooltip: Restore default values for this row
general.missingGlobalError: GLOBAL (*) record not found. You need to create global value first.
general.globalBootstrapSuccess: Missing keys created with empty defaults.
general.deleteTooltip: Tip: "Delete*" deletes GLOBAL (*) record. "Delete" deletes selected locale override.

keyDescriptions.ui_header: Top menu labels and CTA button.

cloudinary.title: Cloudinary / Storage Settings
cloudinary.description: These are global settings (locale=*). Selected language is for UI only.
cloudinary.testSuccess: Cloudinary connection successful. Cloud: {cloud}, test file: {publicId}
cloudinary.testFailedConsole: Cloudinary test failed. Check console for details.
cloudinary.testFailedLocal: Cloudinary test failed: storage_driver is currently 'local'. To use Cloudinary, set storage_driver to 'cloudinary' and fill in the keys.
cloudinary.testFailedConfig: Cloudinary not configured: Fill in Cloud name, API key and secret values and try again.
cloudinary.testInfo: Click "Cloudinary Test" button to test connection.
cloudinary.testInfoError: Last test: ERROR – check logs for details.

branding.title: Branding & Identity
branding.description: General panel settings: page title, copyright, favicons and meta tags.

fields.htmlLangHelp: <html lang="..."> attribute. e.g.: de, en, tr

brandMedia.title: Logo & Favicon
brandMedia.description: This tab is language-independent. Records are stored as locale="*".

api.title: API & Integration Settings
api.description: These are global settings (locale=*). Selected language is for UI only.
api.note: These fields usually do not vary by language. Stored as locale=* in database.
api.googleClientIdHelp: Client ID for Google OAuth / Login integration.
api.googleClientSecretHelp: For security, manage with backend environment variables if possible.
api.gtmContainerIdHelp: If GTM is active, frontend only loads GTM script; GA4 tag is managed within GTM.
api.ga4MeasurementIdHelp: Can be used as fallback with gtag.js if GTM is not available.
api.cookieConsentHelp: If you enter JSON, it's stored as object. If you enter plain text, it's stored as string.
api.saveError: An error occurred while saving API settings.

seo.title: SEO Settings
seo.description: GLOBAL (*) default + selected language ({locale}) override are managed together. "Edit" button opens the form page.
seo.ogDefaultImageHelp: Automatically saved after upload. Same as {key} in Brand & Media tab.
seo.hasOverride: No {locale} override for this key; GLOBAL (*) is applied.
seo.restoreTooltip: Restore default values for this row
seo.note: site_meta_default cannot be GLOBAL(*); edit link always opens with locale.
seo.defaultNotDefined: No default is defined for this key.
seo.siteMetaDefaultGlobalError: site_meta_default cannot be GLOBAL(*). Save/restore with a locale.
seo.siteMetaDefaultMustBeLocale: site_meta_default cannot be GLOBAL(*). Select a locale and restore.
seo.globalBootstrapTooltip: Creates missing SEO GLOBAL(*) records with default schema
seo.ogUpdateError: Failed to update default OG image.
seo.siteMetaDefaultGlobalDeleteHint: Normally not GLOBAL; if present it can be deleted.
seo.seedNote: If seed ran, at least seo and site_seo GLOBAL rows should exist.
